message.content: TUI 슬래시 명령어 버그 수정 및 UX 개선\n\n[CRITICAL RULE] When using the 'edit' tool, you MUST use the ≔[line]..[line] line-range replacement format exactly as required by the tool. DO NOT use diff or block replacement formats. Failing to do so will cause immediate abort.
Error: Gemini does not recognize the requested model (HTTP 404). The id may be retired, gated, or mistyped — pick another with /model.
